chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-419 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Before; Mr. Justice Muhammad Shafi Siddiqui Mr. Justice Irshad Ali Shah. 1. For orders on M.A. No.4006/2022. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on M.A. No.4007/2022. 4. For hearing of main case. 31.03.2022 Petitioner is present in person. == Urgency is granted. It is contended by the petitioner that his late father was allotted 32 acres of the land by Secretary Land Utilization at District Badin; despite direction issued by the Ombudsman of Sindh; no relief is being provided to him by the respondents, therefore, they to be directed to restore the possession of the land allotted to his father with mutation of its record. The issue of the possession of the land with its mutation involving factual controversy could not be resolved by this Court in exercise of its constitutional jurisdiction; consequently, the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine together with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Muhammad Danish*
